---
title: "Types"
description: "Browse the public API by type."
body-classes: "cpp-api-page cpp-api-types-page"
---

| Kind | Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| struct | [`SceneInputs`](#scene-inputs) | Selected pose and IMU input file paths. |
| struct | [`PoseSample`](#pose-sample) | One sample from the reference pose stream. |
| struct | [`ImuSample`](#imu-sample) | One sample from the input IMU stream. |
| struct | [`LoadedScene`](#loaded-scene) | Loaded reference-pose and IMU streams. |
| struct | [`GpsSample`](#gps-sample) | One synthetic 2D GPS sample. |
| struct | [`StartupInitialization`](#startup-initialization) | Initialization data required to start the filter. |
| class | [`Eskf`](#eskf) | Error-state Kalman filter over position, velocity, and attitude. |

## `SceneInputs` {#scene-inputs}

Selected pose and IMU input file paths.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L11">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct SceneInputs
```
:::

**Fields**

- `pose_path`: Pose file path.
- `imu_path`: IMU file path.

## `PoseSample` {#pose-sample}

One sample from the reference pose stream.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L17">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct PoseSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds as std::int64_t.
- `pos`: Reference global position in meters.
- `orientation`: Reference orientation quaternion in [w, x, y, z].
- `vel`: Reference ego-frame velocity sample in m/s.

## `ImuSample` {#imu-sample}

One sample from the input IMU stream.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L27">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct ImuSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds as std::int64_t.
- `specific_force`: Measured specific force in frame I.
- `rotation_rate`: Measured angular velocity in frame I.
- `q_AI`: Quaternion from frame I to gravity-aligned frame A in [w, x, y, z].

## `LoadedScene` {#loaded-scene}

Loaded reference-pose and IMU streams.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L41">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct LoadedScene
```
:::

**Fields**

- `pose_samples`: Loaded pose samples.
- `imu_samples`: Loaded IMU samples.

## `GpsSample` {#gps-sample}

One synthetic 2D GPS sample.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L47">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct GpsSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds as std::int64_t.
- `xy`: Measured horizontal position in meters.

## `StartupInitialization` {#startup-initialization}

Initialization data required to start the filter.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L53">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct StartupInitialization
```
:::

**Fields**

- `v0_G`: Initial velocity in frame G.
- `p0_G`: Initial position in frame G.
- `q0_GI`: Initial attitude quaternion from I to G.
- `next_imu_index`: First IMU sample not used by initialization.
- `next_gps_index`: First GPS sample not used by initialization.
- `last_imu_utime`: Timestamp of the last IMU sample used by initialization.

## `Eskf` {#eskf}

Error-state Kalman filter over position, velocity, and attitude.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L10">source</a></div>

```cpp
class Eskf
```
:::

### Methods

#### `Initialize`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L17">source</a></div>

```cpp
void Initialize(const StartupInitialization& startup_initialization);
```
:::

Initialize the filter from the startup initialization.

##### Inputs

- `startup_initialization`: Startup state used to begin filtering.

#### `Predict`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L24">source</a></div>

```cpp
void Predict(const ImuSample& imu_sample);
```
:::

Propagate the filter with one IMU sample.

##### Inputs

- `imu_sample`: IMU sample used for propagation.
